info.title: Fi Lahza API
info.description: API Documentation for Felahza (Fi Lahza) Backend. Fully compatible with Postman and Apidog. Supports Provider and Driver authentication, profile management, document uploads, and delivery operations.

post.description: Create a new provider account in the system. New providers start with pending verification status and must upload required documents.

201.description: Provider registered successfully. Account requires document verification.

message.example: Provider registered successfully. Please upload required documents for verification.

value.message: Provider registered successfully. Please upload required documents for verification.

422.description: Validation errors. Email/phone already registered or invalid input.

email: The email has already been taken.

password: The password must be at least 8 characters.
password_confirmation: The password confirmation does not match.

post.description: Authenticate provider using email/phone and password. Returns Sanctum access token valid for 24 hours.

value.message: Your account is pending verification. Please upload required documents.

post.description: Send a password reset link to the provider's registered email address.

200.description: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox for reset link.

message.example: Password reset link sent to your email.

value.message: Password reset link sent to your email. Please check your inbox.

post.description: Reset provider password using token received in password reset email.

200.description: Password reset successful. You can now login with new password.

value.message: Password reset successfully. You can now login with your new password.

422.description: Invalid token, expired token, or password mismatch.

token: This password reset token is invalid.

password_confirmation: The password confirmation does not match.

post.description: Revoke the active Sanctum token. Provider will need to login again for new token.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated provider's profile information.

post.description: Update provider profile information (name, business details, location, language preference).
Upload or update provider's profile image. Supported formats: PNG, JPG. Max size: 2MB.

422.description: Validation errors (invalid file type or size).

image: The image must be a file of type: png, jpg, jpeg.

post.description: Upload provider required documents for verification (National ID, Tax Card, Commercial Register). Required for account approval.

201.description: Document uploaded successfully and sent for verification.

422.description: Validation errors (invalid document type or file).

file: The file must be a file of type: pdf, png, jpg, jpeg.

post.description: Create a new driver account in the system. New drivers start with pending verification status.

201.description: Driver registered successfully. Account requires document verification.

value.message: Driver registered successfully. Please upload required documents for verification.

422.description: Validation errors. Email/phone already registered or invalid input.

email: The email has already been taken.

post.description: Authenticate driver using email/phone and password. Returns Sanctum access token valid for 24 hours.
Send a password reset link to the driver's registered email address.

message.example: Password reset link sent to your email.

post.description: Reset driver password using token received in password reset email.
Revoke the active Sanctum token. Driver will need to login again for new token.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated driver's profile information including rating and trip statistics.

post.description: Update driver profile information (name, location, language preference).
Upload or update driver's profile image. Supported formats: PNG, JPG. Max size: 2MB.

422.description: Validation errors (invalid file type or size).

post.description: Upload driver required documents for verification (Driver License, Vehicle Registration). Required for account approval.

201.description: Document uploaded successfully and sent for verification.

422.description: Validation errors (invalid document type or file).

bearerAuth.description: Provider, Driver, or Admin Sanctum access token received upon successful login

LoginRequest.description: Either email or phone is required

email: The email has already been taken.
password: The password must be at least 8 characters.
